Gardens that look sharp, year-round. Without you having to think about it.

Local, owner-operated. Weekly maintenance, garden makeovers, and full landscape builds across Adelaide and surrounding suburbs.

Maintenance plans

How often should we visit?

Pick the rhythm that suits your garden and budget. All plans include mowing, edging, hedging, weeding, blow-down, and green-waste removal.

Weekly

🌿🌿🌿

For sharp lawns and high-traffic gardens. Best during the growing season (Sep–Apr) or for premium-presented homes.

Fortnightly

🌿🌿

The sweet spot for most homes. Keeps things tidy without overservicing.

Monthly

🌿

Light-touch upkeep for low-maintenance gardens, established natives, or properties used as rentals.

Why GreenEdge

Why choose us

Local & owner-operated

One team that knows your garden. No subbies, no surprises.

Fully insured & licensed

Public liability covered. Landscaping work licensed in SA. Certificates on request.

Tidy as we go

Drop sheets, green waste removed, no mess left behind. We treat your place like ours.

On time, every time

We turn up when we say we will. If we can't, we call first.

Our story

Built by someone who actually likes gardens.

GreenEdge is an Adelaide gardening and landscaping business built on a simple idea — your garden should look sharp, year-round, without you having to think about it.

We started because we got tired of how most garden services run: vans full of subcontractors, jobs squeezed into impossible schedules, lawns half-mowed and hedges half-trimmed. We do it differently — small team, full attention, real care for the gardens we look after.

Whether you need weekly mowing, a full landscape redesign, or just someone reliable to keep your hedges in line, we'd love to help.

🌿

Owner-operated

Same crew every visit. We know your garden as well as you do.

🏡

Five years strong

Hundreds of Adelaide gardens looked after, and counting.

Credentials

Fully Insured Licensed Landscaper Police Checked Free Quotes

Mark D. · Burnside

“Two years using GreenEdge, never had to chase them. Just consistent good work.”
